title: Bazaar Utils ✦ Hypixel Skyblock
description: A Hypixel Skyblock QOL mod focused on the bazaar. Features include order outbid notifications, item bookmarks, custom buy order amounts, and more. Compatible with Skyblocker and Skyhanni.
body:
# Bazaar Utils [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1337164726802579597?style=flat&label=discord&color=red)](https://discord.gg/xDKjvm5hQd) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/c4u7nzUZ?label=modrinth%20downloads&color=red)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bazaar-utils) [![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/mkram17/Bazaar-Utils?style=flat&logoColor=green&color=red)](https://github.com/mkram17/Bazaar-Utils/releases)
## 🔍Features - **Custom Orders**: Create buttons in the buy order and insta buy menu for options of different buy amountss. - **Insta Sell Rules**: Prevent accidental insta selling by requiring multiple clicks based on price, volume, or item name restrictions you choose. - **Flip Helper**: Adds a button in the flip GUI to easily flip order at market price. - **Outdated Item Notifications**: Receive chat alerts when an order is undercut, click the message to open the bazaar. - **Stash Helper**: Keybind (default ALT + V) to close GUIs and pick up your stash. - **Disable Stash Messages**: Option to turn off chat reminders to pick up your stash. - **Bookmarks**: Easily search for bookmarked items from the main Bazaar menu. - **Price Charts**: CTRL+SHIFT + click an item in the Bazaar to open its skyblock.finance page. - **Bazaar Coin Limit Tracker**: See how many coins you have left to use in the bazaar before you hit your daily limit. ## ❓Using Bazaar Utils REMEMBER -- if your bazaar flipper account upgrade is not level one, change your bazaar tax with `/bazaarutils tax {tax percentage}` or the mod won't work right ##### To open the mod config use `/bazaarutils` or `/bu`.
🧾Other Commands - `/bu customorder add {order amount} {slot number}` (top left slot is slot #1, to the right is #2, etc etc) - `/bu customorder remove {order number}` (the order it is shown in config) - `/bu rule add {volume, price or item name} {amount over which will be restricted}` - `/bu rule remove {rule number}` - `/bu developer` (to enable developer settings, you probably wont use this)
🖼️ Gallery **Custom Orders** ![Custom Orders Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fbbcac772dfeee36cd1c1cd7957c84ae0d05082.png) _Create custom order buttons (the glass panes on the right) which are shortcuts to buying a set amount of an item in buy orders or insta buy._ **Bookmarks** ![Bookmarks Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1fb40b47fa3748895afd1f560b00fb30ecc6f8b.png) _Bookmarks for items in the bazaar. When you open the main page of the bazaar, you will see your bookmarks on the right. Clicking one will search for that item. To create a bookmark, you can click the button in the top left when you are in an item's page._ **Settings General Page** ![Settings General Page Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97298f826bb00e81c888d8f337d6d74d2184d03b.png) **Flip Helper** ![Flip Helper Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3740f3a97faf72e6990c65b4c437006dc5698bf3.png) _Makes button (the cherry sign) that you can click to flip your order, undercutting the market price by .1 coin._ **Price Charts** ![Price Charts Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce2d16c9664a04e388993990a45990ab9dacc2e0.png) _Ctrl+Shift click an item in the bazaar to open that item's skyblock.finance page. There is a confirmation screen before you are redirected._ **Sell Rules** ![Sell Rules Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec74e26ec24940cfe7b102e97436bf0c84b233d.png) _Create rules which stop you from insta selling items in your inventory. Ex: I can make a rule for "diamond" and a rule for price <100,000, and it would require three clicks to sell your inventory if you have diamonds or the items cost > 100,000._
🛠️Future Features - Option to control frequency of pick up stash messages - Notifications for when an order becomes price competitive again after it was outdated - Theme options - Support for other languages
